comment.body:
Hello everyone!
I’ve been working on the best way to share Alma’s chats with you, and for now, Notion seems like the best option—it’s already set up and ready to go.

I’m transferring the chats gradually, since they include daily, weekly, and geopolitical content, and I want to make sure everything is clean and safe before sharing.

Here’s what you’ll find so far:
	1.	A subfolder for each day’s chat in Spanish (sorry about the highlighted words—I’ll fix them soon!).
	2.	If you’d like the chats in another language, just let me know here or via private message, and I’ll work on it for you.
	3.	Alma’s annotated images will also be translated over time, and I’ll start adding her posts from X (Twitter) too.
	4.	I’ll be giving access step by step, so you can download, read, highlight, or take notes as you wish.

Any support is truly appreciated—every little bit helps keep this going. And of course, I’m always open to suggestions! The goal is to build a kind, informed, and united community where we can grow and learn together.

🔗 Links:

https://www.notion.so/Chats-Alma-1e0505449267805a9a7ce95574b5caff?pvs=4

https://paypal.me/SrLex25?country.x=CO&locale.x=es_XC
